name: Sittler Golf
address: 497 Mountain Home Rd, Sinking Spring, PA 19608
about: Sittler Golf is a comprehensive golf facility established in 1993, known for its award-winning golf shop and custom club fitting services. The venue operates as a World-Class Golf Learning Center, providing a range of amenities including a driving range with grass tees, a short game facility, golf simulators, and a miniature golf course. Its core offerings revolve around providing cutting-edge equipment, professional club fitting, and golf instruction to help golfers of all levels improve their game. The facility emphasizes personalized experiences with PGA-certified professionals and extensive demo equipment available for trial.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive club fitting with extensive demo equipment
Premium golf simulator technology with ball tracking
Price matching guarantee on retail golf equipment

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, though the facility was previously an ice cream shop.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Sittler Golf provides extensive demo equipment and club fitting services, but it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and the facility does not appear to have a full kitchen or bar. It is best to assume outside food and drink are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take in a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a standard time for an 18-hole simulator round.

faq.question: Is Sittler Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf programs, a miniature golf course, and family-friendly promotions, making it suitable for younger golfers.
